v0.6.2.description:
## SMBW Archipelago v0.6.2

### First-time users — start here

**[docs/first-time-setup.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/blob/v0.6.2/docs/first-time-setup.md)** — full walkthrough: prerequisites, multiworld generation, and the SMBW Client setup wizard.

### Verifying the download

```
sha256sum -c smbwonder.apworld.sha256
```


## What's Changed
* open-world: fix Petal Isles open-course "fly" demo storm on every entry by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/pull/143


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/smbw_ap/compare/v0.6.1...v0.6.2
